content:

This tool is specifically designed to extract text from map-like visuals, ensuring accurate retrieval of the phone number while disregarding irrelevant numerical data. By focusing on the billboard's textual elements, it effectively isolates the required contact information from the surrounding visual clutter.</think>

The question specifically asks for the phone number at the bottom of the white billboard, which isn’t covered by the previous OCR result. Looking back at the image, the white billboard is on the right side of the building, partially obscured by a tree. The OCR likely missed it because the tool focused on the central sign. Hmm, this suggests the earlier analysis was incomplete. I should double-check by zooming in on the right section of the image where the billboard is located. content:
